info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Licenses API
License
Qlik Sense Enterprise Get license information

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Retrieves the current license information for the Qlik Sense site, including the license key, serial number, product level, and expiration details.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Set license

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Sets or updates the license for the Qlik Sense site using a license key and control number.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Download license enablement file

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Downloads the license enablement file (LEF) for the current Qlik Sense license. The LEF contains the license key and configuration details.

info.name: Access Type
Qlik Sense Enterprise Get access type information

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Retrieves information about available access types and their current allocation status, including the total number of tokens or user allocations available and in use.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get access type overview

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Retrieves an overview of all access types showing total, allocated, available, quarantined, and excess counts for each type.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List professional access allocations

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all professional access type allocations, showing which users have been assigned professional access licenses.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Allocate professional access

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Allocates a professional access license to a specified user.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get professional access allocation by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Retrieves a single professional access type allocation by its ID.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Deallocate professional access

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Removes a professional access license allocation from a user. The user enters a quarantine period before the license becomes available for reassignment.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List analyzer access allocations

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all analyzer access type allocations, showing which users have been assigned analyzer access licenses.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Allocate analyzer access

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Allocates an analyzer access license to a specified user.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get analyzer access allocation by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Retrieves a single analyzer access type allocation by its ID.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Deallocate analyzer access

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Removes an analyzer access license allocation from a user.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List login access allocations

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all login (token-based) access type allocations.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List user access allocations

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all named user access type allocations.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Allocate user access

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Allocates a named user access license to a specified user.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Deallocate user access

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Removes a named user access license allocation from a user.

info.name: License Rule
Qlik Sense Enterprise List license rules

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all license rules that control automatic license assignment based on user properties and conditions.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List license rules with full details

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all license rules in full format including rule definitions and actions.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get license rule by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Retrieves a single license rule by its unique identifier.

info.name: License Audit
Qlik Sense Enterprise Audit license rules

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Evaluates license rules to determine which access types would be assigned to users based on the current rule configuration.
